strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with experience in distributed systems and event-driven architectures
Direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Proven track record of scaling systems and teams, including leadership in high-performance environments (e.g., Sociomantic)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, or regulatory compliance)
No clear evidence of hands-on multi-agent AI system production experience beyond tooling contributions
Background lacks focus on real-time inference systems and financial modeling, critical for the role
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals and leadership potential with experience in scalable systems and AI-agent tooling, but lacks direct fintech or multi-agent AI production experience. His fintech exposure is minimal, and while his distributed-systems background is solid, it does not directly align with the core requirements of algorithmic working-capital or credit-risk systems. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not yet sufficient to meet the role's high bar for production-grade agentic AI in fintech.
